name: joel4-5--ai-video-cinematography
description: AI视频创作 cinematography 完整指南，包含运镜技巧、情绪表达、皮肤真实感提示词和实战案例。Use when: (1) Generating AI videos (Kling, Runway, Luma, Sora, 可灵, 即梦, 海螺, Veo3) (2) Creating realistic human characters with cinematic techniques (3) Writing video/image prompts with professional camera movements (4) Need emotional expression mapping to camera terminology (5) Seeking skin realism prompts for AI-generated portraits
